message:
feat(core): implement credential file watcher core (bd-biu)

Complete the credential_watcher.rs stub with a fully functional
filesystem watcher that detects account switches vs token refreshes:

- Spawn background thread for event processing with debouncing (500ms)
- Integrate notify crate's RecommendedWatcher with actual watch/unwatch
- Thread-safe shared state via Arc<Mutex<>> for watched file registry
- Clean shutdown via stop channel (dropped when CredentialWatcher drops)
- New recv() and recv_timeout() methods for blocking event consumption
- All existing tests pass plus new automatic event detection test

This unblocks bd-uf0 (daemon process management).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
